tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service - Utica Avenue

payload.description: Implementation of Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue B46 corridor including bus lanes, left-turn bays, turn restrictions, and pedestrian islands. St. Johns Place to Church Avenue phase implemented Summer 2014; Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue phase implementing August-September 2015.

tool_args.label: Vision Zero Priority Corridor

payload.claim_text: Utica Avenue B46 corridor is a Vision Zero Priority Corridor. 7 pedestrians killed and 57 pedestrians severely injured (2009-2013).
payload.subject: Utica Avenue B46 corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: Vision Zero Priority Corridor • 7 pedestrians killed and 57 pedestrians severely injured (2009-2013)

tool_args.label: SBS Benefits

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service has brought: 15-23% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets/reduction in crashes.
payload.subject: Select Bus Service in New York City

tool_args.label: Transit mode share near B46 corridor

payload.claim_text: Residents' Mode to Work near B46 corridor (2008-2012 ACS 5-Year Estimates, 1/4 mile from B46 corridor): Transit 61%, Driving 24%, Walk/Bicycle 10%, Other 5%.
payload.subject: Residents near B46 corridor
payload.description: Mode share for residents within 1/4 mile of B46 corridor
